objective_statement: Identify the problem to solve using AI (Recognize the need being addressed, Determine input/output expectations, Assess whether AI is appropriate, Evaluate advantages and disadvantages, Define measurable success, Benchmark against organizational risks)
Classify the problem type (Examine available data characteristics, Determine problem type such as classifier regression unsupervised or reinforcement)
Identify required expertise areas (Business expertise needs, Domain/subject-matter expertise, AI expertise requirements, Implementation expertise)
Build a security plan (Assess access levels and permissions, Evaluate infrastructure security, Assess the risk of using a certain model or potential attack surfaces)

Ensure appropriate AI use (Identify potential ways that the AI can mispredict or harm specific user groups, Establish data gathering guidelines, Set algorithm selection criteria, Consider data subject interpretation, Guard against out-of-context results)
Choose transparency and validation activities (Communicate intended purpose of data collection, Determine appropriate result visibility, Review industry-specific legal requirements)
Choose data collection methods (Determine data type and characteristics needed, Decide between existing vs new datasets, Decide whether collection can be automated or requires user input)
Assess data quality (Determine if dataset meets needs of task, Identify missing or corrupt elements)
Ensure data representativeness (Examine collection techniques for bias sources, Verify sufficient data for unbiased modeling)
Identify resource requirements (Assess solvability with available computing resources, Consider project budget and available resources)
Convert data to suitable formats (Convert data to binary such as images becoming pixels, Convert computer data into features suitable for AI such as sentences becoming tokens)
Select features for the AI model (Determine which features of data to include, Build initial feature vectors, Consult with subject-matter experts to confirm feature selection)
Engage in feature engineering (Review features and identify transformations, Create processed datasets)
Identify training and test data sets (Separate data appropriately, Ensure test set representativeness)
Document data decisions (List assumptions predicates and constraints upon which design choices have been reasoned, Make information available to regulators and users)
Consider algorithm applicability (Evaluate AI algorithm families, Select suitable algorithms)
Train model using selected algorithm (Train with initial parameters, Tune model parameters, Gather performance metrics, Iterate as needed)
Select specific model after experimentation (Evaluate cost speed and other factors, Verify explainability requirements met)
Tell data stories (Create result visualizations, Identify trends, Verify visualization usefulness for decision-making)
Evaluate model performance (Check for overfitting and underfitting, Generate metrics/KPIs, Cross-validate with new test data)

Identify bias sources in algorithms (Verify inputs resemble training data, Confirm that training data do not contain irrelevant correlations, Check data imbalances, Guard against self-fulfilling prophecies, Verify algorithm explainability)
Evaluate model sensitivity (Test sensitivity metrics, Test specificity metrics)
Confirm regulatory adherence (Evaluate outputs against defined thresholds, Document results)
Obtain stakeholder approval (Collect results and benchmark risks, Conduct evaluation sessions)
Train customers on product use (Inform users of model limitations, Inform users of intended model usage, Share documentation, Manage expectations)
Plan to address production challenges (Understand likely challenge types, Identify challenge indicators, Understand mitigation strategies)

Design production pipeline (Create training/prediction pipeline for product needs, Find the solution that works with the existing data stores, Build AI-application connections, Build user feedback mechanism, Test AI accuracy robustness and speed, Test application scalability)
Support the AI solution (Document solution functions for maintenance, Train support team, Implement feedback mechanism, Implement drift detector, Establish new data gathering processes)

domain_name: Maintaining and Monitoring AI in Production
objective_statement: Engage in oversight (Log application and model performance to facilitate security debug accountability and audit, Implement robust monitoring systems, Act on alerts, Observe the system over time in a variety of contexts to check for drift, Detect system failures with new information)

domain_name: Maintaining and Monitoring AI in Production
objective_statement: Assess business impact using KPIs (Track impact metrics, Compare metrics before and after changes, Act on unexpected metrics)

domain_name: Maintaining and Monitoring AI in Production
objective_statement: Measure impacts on individuals and communities (Analyze subgroup impacts, Identify and mitigate issues, Identify optimization opportunities)

domain_name: Maintaining and Monitoring AI in Production
objective_statement: Handle user feedback (Measure user satisfaction, Assess user understanding, Incorporate feedback into updates)

domain_name: Maintaining and Monitoring AI in Production
objective_statement: Consider improvement or decommission (Combine observations for AI value assessment, Decide whether to retrain continue or decommission)
